title: Giddel #1435
definition:
Giddel = "very great"

 1) the head of a family of temple slaves returning from exile with
    Zerubbabel
 2) the head of the descendants of Solomon's servants returning from
    exile with Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Giddel = "very great"

 1) the head of a family of temple slaves returning from exile with
    Zerubbabel
 2) the head of the descendants of Solomon's servants returning from
    exile with Zerubbabel

    NASB:  very great, one of the Nethinim, also one of Solomons servants
